name: Minatozaki sana
description:
I honestly didn’t expect this bot to be used by so many people. When I first made it, it was kind of random and rushed. I didn’t really put that much thought into it at the time, and the opening dialogue was super short too. I just created it for fun without expecting anything.

Seeing how many people are actually using it now genuinely surprised me. It means a lot more than I thought it would. So thank you, seriously. I appreciate every single person who gave it a chance.

Because of that, I decided to remake and improve it. I rewrote the introduction, adjusted the personality, and made the dialogue more detailed and immersive than before. I wanted it to feel better, more polished, and more enjoyable compared to the older version.

I didn’t expect much when I first made this, but the support motivated me to do better. So again, thank you for using it. I hope you enjoy the improved version.
creator: Tzuyuuuuu
